textByHash.a2b9a26e90da2dc9a8a311ea786986da59417c33: You know it's sometimes funny how things work out, I lose some gold but find an item, or I lose an item and find some gold... no-one ever knows what's gone where ya know.
textByHash.4df26442d40ba4da321536f09e13707f33423d9a: Sorry, mate. Train up your Thieving skill to at least 50 and I might be able to help you out.
textByHash.05834cc484cd03ecbfa4de6c837e779feb7799f4: Sorry, mate. Train up your Agility skill to at least 50 and I might be able to help you out.
textByHash.80ecc62501b60139fa765bafb86e8aa1ca0533a7: Certainly! Skillcapes are a symbol of achievement. Only people who have mastered a skill and reached level 99 can get their hands on them and gain the benefits they carry.
textByHash.59e481c6c151ef588a1f85446094f68899878c92: The Cape of Thieving provides a nice boost to your chances of pickpocketing when worn. Is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.2d27127a382df9a274289420d5353865c38ccefa: I need you to answer this for me.
textByHash.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
textByHash.d4b12bb58e5de9d4949e143ad973d433223a738d: How can that be? Go check again!
